name: Cashway Fintech Co.,Ltd.
summary: Cashway Fintech Co.,Ltd. provides financial electronic products and solutions worldwide. The company engages in the research and development, manufacture, marketing, operation, and monitoring of banking self-service equipment. It offers ATM, CRS, kiosk, and self-service machines; ATMC, ATMP, and ATMV software solutions; and equipment maintenance and outsource services. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Tianjin, China.
